channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Download: an AI agent’s hit piece, and preventing lightning
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Online haras...

item.title: How much wildfire prevention is too much?
item.description: The race to prevent the worst wildfires has been an increasingly high-tech one. Companies are proposing AI fire detection systems and drones that can ...

item.title: Online harassment is entering its AI era
item.description: Scott Shambaugh didn’t think twice when he denied an AI agent’s request to contribute to matplotlib, a software library that he helps manage. Like man...

item.title: MassRobotics resident startups surpass $2B in funding
item.description: MassRobotics' mission is to help create and scale the next generation of successful robotics and physical AI companies. The post MassRobotics resident...

item.title: Waymo robotaxi fails to stop for school bus in Austin
item.description: A remote human error led a Waymo robotaxi to illegally pass an Austin school bus, sparking a federal investigation. The post Waymo robotaxi fails to s...

item.title: The Download: Earth’s rumblings, and AI for strikes on Iran

item.title: Bridging the operational AI gap
item.description: The transformational potential of AI is already well established. Enterprise use cases are building momentum and organizations are transitioning from ...

item.title: AW 2026 features Korea humanoid debuts as industry seeks digital transformation
item.description: In addition to humanoid robots from Agibot, Boston Dynamics, Leju, and Unitree, AW 2026 showed opportunities for physical AI in South Korea. The post ...

item.title: Noble Machines exits stealth with Moby humanoid
item.description: Noble Machines said it already shipped AI-driven humanoids robots to a Fortune Global 500 customer within 18 months of launch. The post Noble Machines...

item.title: HEBI wins NASA SBIR to build space robot actuators
item.description: NASA can use space-rated actuation hardware for a wide range of applications, including in robotic arms that deploy equipment. The post HEBI wins NASA...

item.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
item.description: Railway , a San Francisco-based cloud platform that has quietly amassed two million developers without spending a dollar on marketing, announced Thurs...

item.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
item.description: The artificial intelligence coding revolution comes with a catch: it's expensive. Claude Code , Anthropic's terminal-based AI agent that can write, de...

item.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
item.description: Alfred Wahlforss was running out of options. His startup, Listen Labs , needed to hire over 100 engineers, but competing against Mark Zuckerberg's $10...

item.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
item.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot , the company's workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification...

item.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
item.description: Anthropic released Cowork on Monday, a new AI agent capability that extends the power of its wildly successful Claude Code tool to non-technical users...

item.title: Best Practices for Building the AI Development Platform in Government
